summary: Comprehensive testing of ORÍGENES agricultural consulting landing page completed. All backend APIs (100%) and frontend features (100%) working correctly. Previous iteration's critical bug (Select dropdown state issue) has been fixed.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ - Root endpoint returns active status
Backend: GET /api/health - Returns database connected status
Backend: POST /api/contact/ - Creates contact with all fields (department, culture)
Backend: POST /api/contact/ - Creates contact without optional fields (defaults to 'No especificado')
Backend: POST /api/contact/ - Creates contact with empty department/culture strings
Backend: GET /api/contact/ - Returns list of contacts
Backend: GET /api/contact/{id} - Retrieves specific contact by ID
Backend: PATCH /api/contact/{id}/status - Updates contact status
Backend: Validation rejects invalid email (422)
Backend: Validation rejects short message (422)
Backend: GET /api/planet/health - Returns connected status
Backend: GET /api/planet/search - Returns real PlanetScope satellite scenes
Backend: GET /api/planet/thumbnail/{item_type}/{item_id} - Returns PNG thumbnail
Backend: Validation rejects invalid coordinates (422)
Backend: POST /api/roboflow/analyze - Requires file upload (422 without file)
Backend: POST /api/roboflow/analyze - Accepts image upload and returns analysis
Frontend: Page loads successfully with green/orange theme
Frontend: Hero section renders with ORÍGENES branding
Frontend: Services section renders
Frontend: Technologies section renders
Frontend: Roboflow Analyzer section renders ('Diagnóstico Inteligente de Cultivos')
Frontend: Planet Monitoring section renders with Leaflet map
Frontend: Planet search returns 8 real satellite scenes with thumbnails
Frontend: Biofactory Portfolio section renders
Frontend: Experience section renders
Frontend: Cultures section renders
Frontend: Contact section renders with correct info
Frontend: Contact email displays correctly (gerencia@origeneskhachi.org)
Frontend: Contact phones display correctly (+57 300 558 2757, +57 310 321 2780)
Frontend: Footer renders with copyright and contact info
Frontend: Contact form - all text inputs work (name, email, phone, hectares, message)
Frontend: Contact form - Department Select dropdown opens and selects value
Frontend: Contact form - Culture Select dropdown opens and selects value
Frontend: Contact form - Submission successful with toast notification
Frontend: Contact form - Data persisted to MongoDB with correct dropdown values
test_credentials: No authentication required - public landing page
seed_data_creation: Test contacts created with TEST_ prefix for backend API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Contact form Select dropdowns now properly update React state and values are persisted to MongoDB. Planet API integration is real (not mocked) and returns actual PlanetScope satellite scenes. Roboflow API integration is real and accepts image uploads for crop analysis.

verified_integrations.Planet API: Real integration - returns actual satellite scenes from Planet Labs
verified_integrations.Roboflow API: Real integration - accepts image uploads for AI crop diagnosis
verified_integrations.MongoDB: Connected and persisting contact form submissions
